allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\zacrt\\Projects_1\\claude-workspace\\Qorizon"; git add -A 2>$null; Write-Host "=== staged file count ==="; \(git diff --cached --name-only | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Host "=== .env files staged? \(must be empty\) ==="; git diff --cached --name-only | Select-String "\\.env"; Write-Host "=== node_modules staged? \(must be empty\) ==="; \(git diff --cached --name-only | Select-String "node_modules" | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Host "=== mapbox token present in any staged file? \(must be empty\) ==="; git diff --cached --name-only | Select-String "trailr/app|trailr/src" | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell(git status --porcelain --untracked-files=all; echo "---RECENT FILES \(last 2 days\)---"; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File -Path "trailr\\app","trailr\\src","packages","supabase" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-2\) -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 LastWriteTime, FullName)
Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="yes, its okay. its mock data we can recreate anyway" npx prisma migrate reset --force --skip-seed)
Bash(PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION="yes, its okay. its mock data we can recreate anyway" npx prisma migrate dev --name init --skip-seed)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force }; Write-Output "port 3000 cleared")

Bash(node -e "const db=require\('./packages/db/dist/index.js'\); console.log\('stopKeys:',typeof db.stopKeys,'| useToggleLike:',typeof db.useToggleLike,'| toggleLike:',typeof db.toggleLike,'| useFeedStops:',typeof db.useFeedStops\)")

Bash(node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on\('data',d=>s+=d\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const a=JSON.parse\(s\);const d1=a.filter\(x=>x.location_name&&!/Test Ramen/.test\(x.location_name\)\);console.log\('total stops:',a.length,'| any Test Ramen left:',a.some\(x=>/Test Ramen/.test\(x.location_name||''\)\)\)}\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Port 3000 cleared")

Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\).on\('end',\(\)=>{const s=JSON.parse\(d\);const n=s.find\(x=>x.location_name&&x.location_name.includes\('Narita'\)\);console.log\('Narita cost =', n? n.cost : 'not found'\);console.log\('stops with cost:', s.filter\(x=>x.cost!=null\).map\(x=>x.location_name+':'+x.cost\).join\(', '\)||'none'\);}\)")

Bash(node -e 'const{PrismaClient}=require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\);const p=new PrismaClient\(\);const T='\\''bbbb0001-0000-0000-0000-000000000001'\\'';\(async\(\)=>{await p.stop.deleteMany\({where:{trip_id:T}}\);await p.tripDay.deleteMany\({where:{trip_id:T}}\);await p.trip.deleteMany\({where:{id:T}}\);console.log\('\\''test trip deleted'\\''\);await p.$disconnect\(\)}\)\(\)')

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const k=process.env.LITEAPI_KEY; console.log\('LITEAPI_KEY set:', !!\(k && k.trim\(\)\), k && k.trim\(\) ? '\(len '+k.trim\(\).length+'\)' : '\(empty/absent\)'\); const d=process.env.DUFFEL_API_KEY; console.log\('DUFFEL set:', !!\(d&&d.trim\(\)\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Hotels: {len\(d\) if isinstance\(d,list\) else d}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);[print\(t.get\('id'\), '-', t.get\('title'\)\) for t in \(d if isinstance\(d,list\) else []\)][:8]")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, @{N='\\''Cmd'\\'';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(60,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''node.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*dist/src/main.js*'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate | Format-Table -Auto | Out-String')
